name: Hot Spiced Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a decorative 10-ounce bottle.
2. Fill the bottle with oil to cover (8 ounces).
3. Close the bottle tightly.
4. Let the ingredients steep for at least 2 weeks, shaking the bottle occasionally.
5. When ready, you can either leave all ingredients in the bottle or decant the oil into another container.
6. This yields about 1 cup of hot spiced oil.
7. The oil can be used to perk up a variety of foods, including soups, stews, salads, and sautéed vegetables.
